content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_explorer

-- Reading JSON files with matrix of data separated by commas
SELECT cafvEligibility_id, classification
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'cafv_eligibility.json',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
    FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
    ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0b'
) 
WITH (
    jsonDoc NVARCHAR(MAX)
) AS cafv_elegibility
CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(jsonDoc)
WITH(
    cafvEligibility_id SMALLINT '$.cafvEligibility',   
    classification VARCHAR(100) 
)
;



-- Multi-line
-- Reading JSON files with matrix of data separated by commas

SELECT cafvEligibility_id, classification
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'cafv_eligibility_multi_line.json',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
    FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
    ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0b'
) 
WITH (
    jsonDoc NVARCHAR(MAX)
) AS cafv_elegibility_multi_line
CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(jsonDoc)
WITH(
    cafvEligibility_id SMALLINT '$.cafvEligibility',   
    classification VARCHAR(100) 
)
;
